webApp.description: Convert raster images (PNG, JPG, WEBP) to scalable vector graphics (SVG). Ideal for AI-generated logos and designs.

home.name: How to Convert Images to SVG with SVGR
home.description: Convert raster images like PNG, JPG, and WEBP to scalable vector graphics using SVGR.

steps.name: Upload Your Image
steps.text: Drag and drop or select a PNG, JPG, or WEBP image to upload.

steps.name: Adjust Settings
steps.text: Set the quality level, image type, and toggle transparent background or text recognition as needed.

steps.name: Convert to SVG
steps.text: Click the Convert button to process your image. The conversion is free and requires no account.

steps.name: Preview the Result
steps.text: Review the SVG output in the preview panel. Adjust quality and re-convert if needed.

steps.name: Download
steps.text: Download the SVG or PDF file. Downloads cost 1 credit each.
